faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.a1: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool — like Zapier, but self-hosted and more powerful. Our templates are pre-built workflows you import directly.
faq.a2: No. Import the JSON, add your API keys, activate. Each template has a step-by-step guide.
faq.a3: Most templates use Claude by Anthropic. Some support GPT-4. You need your own API key.
faq.a4: Yes. Everything is fully editable inside n8n. Make them yours.
faq.a5: 30-day money-back guarantee. If it doesn't work for you, full refund.
